title: citrus × webberi
intro: Citrus × webberi, also known as Meyer lemon, is a hybrid citrus plant resulting from the cross between a lemon (Citrus limon) and an orange (Citrus sinensis). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Citrus × webberi include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Citrus × webberi can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, juices, and infusions, as well as being used in cooking and as a garnish for various dishes.
